prestazioni: Replace the original **AK250E** 606cc inline-4 engine with a **Honda F20C (S2000 AP1)** 2.0L naturally aspirated block, bored to 2.2L using a **JE 87mm forged piston kit** (12.5:1 compression) and paired with **Toda Racing billet crankshaft** and **Toda H-beam connecting rods**. The head is ported and polished by **Norwood Autocraft** with **Toda Racing Type-R cams (280° intake/280° exhaust)** and **Supertech titanium valves**. Fueling is handled by a **Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from **Jenvey Dynamics**. Exhaust is a **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 header** paired with a **Mugen 70mm titanium exhaust system**.

Suspension is fully custom **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** with **Eibach ERS race springs (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear)** and **SuperPro poly bushings** throughout. Braking is upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** with **330mm two-piece rotors** (front) and **280mm rotors** (rear), paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**. The rear differential is swapped for a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** with **Motul Gear 300 75W-90** fluid.

Forced induction (if pursuing boost) involves a **Rotrex C38-91 supercharger** with **custom intercooler setup** (front-mount **PWR 500x225x76mm core**) and **AEM 3.5 bar MAP sensor**. The supercharger is driven by a **Toda Racing pulley system** (70mm crank pulley) and tuned via **Haltech Elite 2500** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor**. Oil cooling is managed by a **Setrab 13-row oil cooler** with **Mocal thermostatic sandwich plate** and **Motul 300V 10W-40** oil.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 S600 widebody kit** (FRP construction) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **GT wing (9 Lives Racing 1700mm)**. The rear bumper is modified to fit a **custom dual-exit exhaust exit** (Mugen-style) with **Burns Stainless 3.5-inch tips**. Wheels are **Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear)**.

Interior is stripped and fitted with **Sparco Pro ADV seats (FIA-approved)** on **Custom Cages bolt-in harness bar** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. The dashboard is replaced with a **Momo Mod 78 steering wheel** on a **NRG quick-release hub**, paired with a **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, oil temp, boost)** and **Haltech CAN-based digital dash**. The shift knob is a **TWM short-throw billet unit** with **custom leather boot**.

Exterior paint is **Honda Championship White (NH-578)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the hood, roof, and rear quarter panels. The headlights are **custom HID projectors (Morimoto XB 4500K)** with **Depo LED taillights**, and the engine bay is detailed with **carbon fiber valve cover (Seibon)** and **anodized gold hardware (ARP, Toda)**. The car sits on **Tein EDFC suspension controllers** for adjustable ride height.
